description_long: This is a heavy-duty hammer featuring a large, rectangular, solid metal head with flat striking faces on both ends. The head is dark in color, likely made of steel or iron, and is attached to a robust, natural wood handle. The handle is straight with a slightly contoured, ergonomic shape for a secure grip, and displays visible wood grain texture. The hammer is designed for delivering powerful blows, suitable for demolition, masonry, or driving stakes. There are no visible brand markings, logos, or additional attachments on the hammer. The surfaces appear clean and well-maintained, with no visible signs of wear or damage.
description: A heavy, rectangular-headed hammer with a solid metal head and a contoured wooden handle, designed for powerful striking tasks. The hammer is clean, with no visible markings or attachments.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the wooden handle and the rectangular metal head.
description_view_1: End-on view highlighting the rounded end of the handle and the width of the metal head.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the handle and the rectangular head, mirroring view 0.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the broad, flat striking face of the metal head and the handle extending behind.
attribute_handle_type: Wooden straight handle with a slightly contoured, ergonomic shape and visible wood grain texture.
attribute_head_type: Rectangular sledge-type head with flat striking faces on both ends, made of solid metal.
